message:
feat(recorder): decouple tantivy_reindex from AppendLogReader

Replace direct AppendLogReader usage in tantivy_reindex with
backend-neutral RecorderEventReader/RecorderEventCursor traits.

- Replace data_path: PathBuf with source: RecorderSourceDescriptor in
  ReindexConfig, BackfillConfig, IntegrityCheckConfig
- Convert full_reindex(), backfill(), IntegrityChecker::check() to use
  cursor-based event reading via create_event_reader() factory
- Add open_cursor_at_ordinal() to RecorderEventReader trait with
  efficient override in AppendLogEventSource
- Remove dead resolve_reindex_data_path() tests and NoPathStorage stub
- Fix tantivy_ingest test compilation (RecorderEventReader import,
  text_content→text field, temporary borrow lifetime)
- Update external test files for new source descriptor field
- All 71 tantivy_reindex tests pass, 97 recorder_storage tests pass

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
